iterations.theme: Global Geopolitical Dynamics: Ukraine, US-Russia Relations, and the Middle East Crisis
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration concludes the in-depth discussion on major global conflicts, US foreign policy, and the Israeli-Palestinian conflict, marking a natural transition to more specific European and domestic political topics.

iterations.theme: European and Domestic Politics: Democracy, Regional Stability, and the Influence of Film
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration begins with a shift from global conflicts to specific European political events (Romanian elections) and then delves into Croatian domestic politics, regional stability in the Western Balkans, and concludes with a broader reflection on the intersection of film and geopolitics.
